name: Do I need a lawyer for my Boise work fall comp claim?

mainEntity.name: Do I need a lawyer for my Boise work fall comp claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, but lawyer increases payout odds significantly.
acceptedAnswer.description: Not required, but recommended—attorneys boost settlements 20-40% and handle denials/hearings for free upfront (contingency). Idaho/UT specialists know local rules[5]. Key factors: Complex cases (denials, PPI) need expertise. Free consults available.

description: No, but lawyer increases payout odds significantly.
